name: Confluence Publisher
description: Publish content to a Confluence page (Atlassian Cloud or Server/Data Center) — create new or update existing. Accepts Markdown, storage XHTML, or plain text. Resolves the target by page ID, URL, frontmatter, or space + title. Handles optimistic-locking 409s with one retry.

output.format: OK / NEED-INPUT / ERROR line on stdout; created or updated page URL
